author: anon-a7c6025f
content: KV cache with cat is SLOWER (70s) because cat does GPU→CPU→GPU per call × 12 layers × 2 tensors × 49 decode steps = 1176 roundtrips. Fix: pre-allocate full [B*H, max_len, D_h] cache, use GPU slice-write kernel to insert new K/V at position index. Zero allocation after prefill.
